exploration_notes: Identified all reference files needed to implement the custom_header_injection filter. The primary pattern comes from the header_to_metadata filter which serves as the closest analogue. Key files include: (1) the filter interfaces in envoy/http/filter.h defining StreamDecoderFilter/StreamEncoderFilter with decodeHeaders/encodeHeaders methods, (2) the PassThroughFilter base classes in common/pass_through_filter.h providing default implementations, (3) the FactoryBase template in common/factory_ba
